text:
Sara (セーラ, Sēra) was a well-known actress. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Appearance

It is unknown what Sara looked like in life. In the 2011 anime adaptation, her hair was black and braided. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 41 (2011) 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Sara's hair is one of the requested items for the Nostrade bodyguard applicants to obtain. Kurapika manages to acquire it with a DNA certificate of authenticity, which allows him to be hired as a bodyguard. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The character's name was omitted in the Viz translation of the manga; the only thing mentioned is "a lock of celebrity hair", but the celebrity's name is not disclosed. 

Translations around the World

References
